variants: Thea Verhoeven, a resident of Hazelstar Promenade, has made a name for herself in analytical chemistry. Her inventive prowess is exemplified by her creation of the Glowstone Reflection Engine, which has been recognized within the field. For her exceptional contributions, she was honored with the Dewhaven Award. Beyond her scientific endeavors, Thea is a member of the Featherleaf Horticulture Circle, where she indulges her passion for gardening and shares her insights with fellow horticulture enthusiasts.
